source: plan/bearings.md § Group-buy hero art — colorful SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Top-down Alice-layout keyboard silhouette with focal silicone cat-ear silhouettes (coral splash) attached to the top edge of the case
prompt: Reuse the established Alice silhouette family (split-symmetric case with ~9° splay, twin spacebars) so the Nyawice reads as 'Alice cousin' at thumbnail size. Strip the dense keycap rect grid down to row-dot suggestion — six dots per row, splayed to match — keeping the eye from competing with the focal silicone. The friction-fit silicone cat ears are the cohort's identity, so they get the only fill: two coral triangles seated into matched notches on the top edge above each cluster's peak, plus a small rounded nose on the front-edge centerline. A slightly darker coral inner-ear shadow keeps each ear reading as soft silicone rather than flat paper. Voice: knowledgeable peer — drawn so the cat ears land as a quietly-charming product feature, not a meme. Single-splash convention upheld: no bronze keycap accent here, the silicone IS the splash.
